feat.name: Superior Bond
feat.text: When you draw upon your bonded item, you can leave a bit of energy within it for later use. You can use Drain Bonded Item one additional time per day, but only to cast a spell 2 or more ranks lower than your highest-rank wizard spell slot.

traits.name: Wizard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the wizard class.
